---
title: ""
---

# Research {#research-title}

## Working Papers

::: {.research-item}
<p class="paper-title">Boxer Rebellion Memory and State Response in Modern China</p>

<p class="paper-desc">This project studies how local historical memory of the Boxer Rebellion shapes contemporary nationalism, collective action, and government responses in China.</p>
:::

::: {.research-item}
<p class="paper-title">The Great Depression and Entry into Scientific Careers</p>

<p class="paper-desc">This project examines whether local exposure to economic distress during the Great Depression affected entry into scientific careers in the United States.</p>
:::

## Work in Progress

::: {.research-item}
<p class="paper-title">Literacy, Information Diffusion, and the Meiji Restoration in Tokugawa Japan</p>

<p class="paper-desc">This project studies whether the spread of terakoya education contributed to information diffusion, political mobilization, and modernization in late Tokugawa Japan.</p>
:::
